prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for phenol were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, in the gas phase, with neutral charge 0 and multiplicity 1. The Fukui function indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor were derived from Mulliken partial charges of the neutral, cation (+1, doublet), and anion (−1, doublet) states. The most electrophilic site is carbon C3 (ortho to OH) with f⁺ = 2.1028319, and the most nucleophilic site is the hydroxyl oxygen (O) with f⁻ = 0.16201477. Charge conservation checks passed (sum of f⁺ and f⁻ both equal 1.0), and the integrity status is trustworthy. A visualization was generated showing the Fukui indices mapped to the molecular structure.</prose>
<parameter name="value">2.1028319
